item.title: Web dashboard CDN resources lack Subresource Integrity (SRI) hashes
item.intent: CDN-hosted assets in web/layout.tsx must carry SRI integrity attributes. A compromised CDN cannot inject malicious code into the ClawHQ dashboard.
item.description: src/web/layout.tsx lines 37 and 39 load Pico CSS from cdn.jsdelivr.net and htmx from unpkg.com without SRI integrity= attributes. If either CDN serves a malicious version of these assets, any code runs in the user's browser with access to the dashboard. This is particularly sensitive for a product whose core promise is data sovereignty and security by default. The dashboard runs on localhost:3737 but it controls agent config, credentials, and approvals. Steps: (1) compute SHA-384 integrity hash for Pico CSS v2 (documented on picocss.com); (2) compute SHA-384 integrity hash for htmx 2.0.4 (documented on htmx.org); (3) add integrity='sha384-...' crossorigin='anonymous' to both <link> and <script> elements in layout.tsx; (4) run web/ tests and verify dashboard still loads. Scope: 1 file, 2 element attribute additions. Medium effort — hash values must be looked up from official sources.
